languages.text: After teleportation, perform INT (-20) test or gain Immobilized for 2 rounds. On success gain Slowed instead.

traits.locale_text: After teleportation, perform INT (-20) test or gain Immobilized for 2 rounds. On success gain Slowed instead.

languages.text: After teleportation, the user must pass an {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}Intelligence{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}resistance test{/g} with a −20 penalty or suffer {g|Encyclopedia:ImmobilisedEffect}immobilised{/g} for 2 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}rounds{/g}. On a successful {g|Encyclopedia:Test}test{/g}, they suffer {g|Encyclopedia:SlowedEffect}slowed{/g} instead.
languages.original_text: After teleportation, perform INT (-20) test or gain Immobilized for 2 rounds. On success gain Slowed instead.

traits.locale_text: After teleportation, the user must pass an Intelligence resistance test with a −20 penalty or suffer {g|Encyclopedia:ImmobilisedEffect}immobilised{/g} for 2 rounds. On a successful test, they suffer {g|f:a7841f4596694e508c302b5ffab92753}slowed{/g} instead.

After teleportation, the user must pass an {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}Intelligence{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}resistance test{/g} with a −20 penalty or suffer {g|Encyclopedia:ImmobilisedEffect}immobilised{/g} for 2 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}rounds{/g}. On a successful {g|Encyclopedia:Test}test{/g}, they suffer {g|Encyclopedia:SlowedEffect}slowed{/g} instead.

After teleportation, the user must pass an Intelligence resistance test with a −20 penalty or suffer {g|Encyclopedia:ImmobilisedEffect}immobilised{/g} for 2 rounds. On a successful test, they suffer {g|f:a7841f4596694e508c302b5ffab92753}slowed{/g} instead.

After teleportation, the user must pass an {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}Intelligence{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}resistance test{/g} with a −20 penalty or suffer {g|Encyclopedia:ImmobilisedEffect}immobilised{/g} for 2 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}rounds{/g}. On a successful {g|Encyclopedia:Test}test{/g}, they suffer {g|Encyclopedia:SlowedEffect}slowed{/g} instead.

languages.text: Завершив телепортацию, обладатель аугмента должен пройти проверку {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}Интеллекта{/g} на {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}сопротивление{/g} со штрафом −20 и в случае провала получает {g|Encyclopedia:ImmobilisedEffect}обездвиживание{/g} на 2 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}раунда{/g}. При успешной {g|Encyclopedia:Test}проверке{/g} он вместо этого получает {g|Encyclopedia:SlowedEffect}замедление{/g}.
languages.original_text: After teleportation, the user must pass an {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}Intelligence{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}resistance test{/g} with a −20 penalty or suffer {g|Encyclopedia:ImmobilisedEffect}immobilised{/g} for 2 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}rounds{/g}. On a successful {g|Encyclopedia:Test}test{/g}, they suffer {g|Encyclopedia:SlowedEffect}slowed{/g} instead.

traits.locale_text: Завершив телепортацию, обладатель аугмента должен пройти проверку {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}Интеллекта{/g} на {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}сопротивление{/g} со штрафом −20 и в случае провала получает {g|Encyclopedia:ImmobilisedEffect}обездвиживание{/g} на 2 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}раунда{/g}. При успешной {g|Encyclopedia:Test}проверке{/g} он вместо этого получает {g|Encyclopedia:SlowedEffect}замедление{/g}.

Завершив телепортацию, обладатель аугмента должен пройти проверку {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}Интеллекта{/g} на {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}сопротивление{/g} со штрафом −20 и в случае провала получает {g|Encyclopedia:ImmobilisedEffect}обездвиживание{/g} на 2 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}раунда{/g}. При успешной {g|Encyclopedia:Test}проверке{/g} он вместо этого получает {g|Encyclopedia:SlowedEffect}замедление{/g}.

languages.text: Después de teletransportarse, el usuario debe superar una {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}prueba de fortaleza{/g} de {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}Inteligencia{/g} con una penalización de −20 o quedará {g|Encyclopedia:ImmobilisedEffect}inmovilizado{/g} durante 2 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}asaltos{/g}. Si supera esta {g|Encyclopedia:Test}prueba{/g}, en vez de eso quedará {g|Encyclopedia:SlowedEffect}ralentizado{/g}.
languages.original_text: After teleportation, the user must pass an {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}Intelligence{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}resistance test{/g} with a −20 penalty or suffer {g|Encyclopedia:ImmobilisedEffect}immobilised{/g} for 2 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}rounds{/g}. On a successful {g|Encyclopedia:Test}test{/g}, they suffer {g|Encyclopedia:SlowedEffect}slowed{/g} instead.

traits.locale_text: Después de teletransportarse, el usuario debe superar una {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}prueba de fortaleza{/g} de {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}Inteligencia{/g} con una penalización de −20 o quedará {g|Encyclopedia:ImmobilisedEffect}inmovilizado{/g} durante 2 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}asaltos{/g}. Si supera esta {g|Encyclopedia:Test}prueba{/g}, en vez de eso quedará {g|Encyclopedia:SlowedEffect}ralentizado{/g}.

languages.text: Nach der Teleportation muss der Nutzer eine {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}Widerstandsprobe{/g} auf {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}Intelligenz{/g} mit einem Abzug von −20 bestehen, um nicht 2 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}Runden{/g} lang {g|Encyclopedia:ImmobilisedEffect}gelähmt{/g} zu sein. Ist die {g|Encyclopedia:Test}Probe{/g} erfolgreich, wird er stattdessen {g|Encyclopedia:SlowedEffect}verlangsamt{/g}.
languages.original_text: After teleportation, the user must pass an {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}Intelligence{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}resistance test{/g} with a −20 penalty or suffer {g|Encyclopedia:ImmobilisedEffect}immobilised{/g} for 2 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}rounds{/g}. On a successful {g|Encyclopedia:Test}test{/g}, they suffer {g|Encyclopedia:SlowedEffect}slowed{/g} instead.

traits.locale_text: Nach der Teleportation muss der Nutzer eine {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}Widerstandsprobe{/g} auf {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}Intelligenz{/g} mit einem Abzug von −20 bestehen, um nicht 2 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}Runden{/g} lang {g|Encyclopedia:ImmobilisedEffect}gelähmt{/g} zu sein. Ist die {g|Encyclopedia:Test}Probe{/g} erfolgreich, wird er stattdessen {g|Encyclopedia:SlowedEffect}verlangsamt{/g}.

languages.text: Kullanıcı, ışınlanmanın ardından −20 ceza puanına sahip bir {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}Zekâ{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}direnç testinden{/g} geçmelidir. Aksi takdirde {g|Encyclopedia:ImmobilisedEffect}felç{/g} olur. Etkisi 2 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}raunt{/g} sürer. {g|Encyclopedia:Test}Testi{/g} geçerse onun yerine {g|Encyclopedia:SlowedEffect}yavaşlama{/g} etkisine maruz kalır.
languages.original_text: After teleportation, the user must pass an {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}Intelligence{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}resistance test{/g} with a −20 penalty or suffer {g|Encyclopedia:ImmobilisedEffect}immobilised{/g} for 2 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}rounds{/g}. On a successful {g|Encyclopedia:Test}test{/g}, they suffer {g|Encyclopedia:SlowedEffect}slowed{/g} instead.

traits.locale_text: Kullanıcı, ışınlanmanın ardından −20 ceza puanına sahip bir {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}Zekâ{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}direnç testinden{/g} geçmelidir. Aksi takdirde {g|Encyclopedia:ImmobilisedEffect}felç{/g} olur. Etkisi 2 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}raunt{/g} sürer. {g|Encyclopedia:Test}Testi{/g} geçerse onun yerine {g|Encyclopedia:SlowedEffect}yavaşlama{/g} etkisine maruz kalır.

languages.text: Après la téléportation, l'utilisateur doit réussir un {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}test de résistance{/g} d'{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}Intelligence{/g} avec une pénalité de −20. En cas d'échec, il est {g|Encyclopedia:ImmobilisedEffect}immobilisé{/g} pendant 2 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}rounds{/g}. En cas de réussite, il est seulement {g|Encyclopedia:SlowedEffect}ralenti{/g}.{g|Encyclopedia:Test}{/g}
languages.original_text: After teleportation, the user must pass an {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}Intelligence{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}resistance test{/g} with a −20 penalty or suffer {g|Encyclopedia:ImmobilisedEffect}immobilised{/g} for 2 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}rounds{/g}. On a successful {g|Encyclopedia:Test}test{/g}, they suffer {g|Encyclopedia:SlowedEffect}slowed{/g} instead.

traits.locale_text: Après la téléportation, l'utilisateur doit réussir un {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}test de résistance{/g} d'{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}Intelligence{/g} avec une pénalité de −20. En cas d'échec, il est {g|Encyclopedia:ImmobilisedEffect}immobilisé{/g} pendant 2 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}rounds{/g}. En cas de réussite, il est seulement {g|Encyclopedia:SlowedEffect}ralenti{/g}.{g|Encyclopedia:Test}{/g}

languages.text: 传送后，使用者必须通过一项有20减值的{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}智力{/g}{g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}抗性检定{/g}，否则就会陷入{g|Encyclopedia:ImmobilisedEffect}定身{/g}状态，持续2{g|Encyclopedia:Round}轮{/g}。若{g|Encyclopedia:Test}检定{/g}成功，则改为陷入{g|Encyclopedia:SlowedEffect}减速{/g}状态。
languages.original_text: After teleportation, the user must pass an {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}Intelligence{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}resistance test{/g} with a −20 penalty or suffer {g|Encyclopedia:ImmobilisedEffect}immobilised{/g} for 2 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}rounds{/g}. On a successful {g|Encyclopedia:Test}test{/g}, they suffer {g|Encyclopedia:SlowedEffect}slowed{/g} instead.

traits.locale_text: 传送后，使用者必须通过一项有20减值的{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}智力{/g}{g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}抗性检定{/g}，否则就会陷入{g|Encyclopedia:ImmobilisedEffect}定身{/g}状态，持续2{g|Encyclopedia:Round}轮{/g}。若{g|Encyclopedia:Test}检定{/g}成功，则改为陷入{g|Encyclopedia:SlowedEffect}减速{/g}状态。

languages.text: テレポート後、使用者は−20のペナルティを伴う{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}知力{/g}{g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}抵抗判定{/g}に成功しなければ、2{g|Encyclopedia:Round}ラウンド{/g}の間{g|Encyclopedia:ImmobilisedEffect}移動不能{/g}を受ける。{g|Encyclopedia:Test}判定{/g}に成功した場合は、代わりに{g|Encyclopedia:SlowedEffect}鈍足{/g}を受ける。
languages.original_text: After teleportation, the user must pass an {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}Intelligence{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}resistance test{/g} with a −20 penalty or suffer {g|Encyclopedia:ImmobilisedEffect}immobilised{/g} for 2 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}rounds{/g}. On a successful {g|Encyclopedia:Test}test{/g}, they suffer {g|Encyclopedia:SlowedEffect}slowed{/g} instead.

traits.locale_text: テレポート後、使用者は−20のペナルティを伴う{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}知力{/g}{g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}抵抗判定{/g}に成功しなければ、2{g|Encyclopedia:Round}ラウンド{/g}の間{g|Encyclopedia:ImmobilisedEffect}移動不能{/g}を受ける。{g|Encyclopedia:Test}判定{/g}に成功した場合は、代わりに{g|Encyclopedia:SlowedEffect}鈍足{/g}を受ける。
